mapper.select: WITH last_msg AS ( SELECT chat_room_id, MAX(chat_message_id) AS last_id FROM chat_message GROUP BY chat_room_id ), unread AS ( SELECT s.chat_room_id, COUNT(*) AS unread_count FROM chat_room_state s JOIN chat_message m ON m.chat_room_id = s.chat_room_id AND m.chat_message_id > COALESCE(s.last_read_message_id, 0) AND m.sender_id <> #{myId} WHERE s.member_id = #{myId} GROUP BY s.chat_room_id ) SELECT r.chat_room_id AS chatRoomId, r.room_name AS roomName, COALESCE(u.unread_count, 0) AS unreadCount, lm.last_id AS lastMessageId, CAST(ml.sender_id AS CHAR) AS lastMessageSenderId, -- senderId를 String으로 매핑 ml.content AS lastMessageContent, ml.created_at AS lastMessageAt FROM chat_room_state s JOIN chat_room r ON r.chat_room_id = s.chat_room_id LEFT JOIN last_msg lm ON lm.chat_room_id = r.chat_room_id LEFT JOIN chat_message ml ON ml.chat_room_id = lm.chat_room_id AND ml.chat_message_id = lm.last_id LEFT JOIN unread u ON u.chat_room_id = r.chat_room_id WHERE s.member_id = #{myId} ORDER BY (ml.created_at IS NULL), ml.created_at DESC

SELECT m.chat_message_id AS id, m.sender_id AS senderId, m.content AS content, m.created_at AS createdAt FROM chat_message m WHERE m.chat_room_id = #{roomId} ORDER BY m.chat_message_id DESC LIMIT #{size}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO chat_message (chat_room_id, sender_id, content, created_at) VALUES (#{roomId}, #{senderId}, #{content}, NOW())
